name: Harmonic Tremolo
description: A two-band tremolo that splits the signal into high and low bands and modulates them out of phase, producing the classic brown-panel harmonic tremolo sound.
author: Audiofab

controls.name: Depth
controls.description: Amount of amplitude modulation applied to each band.

controls.name: Cutoff Freq
controls.description: Crossover frequency between the high-band and low-band.
